programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives
programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives

programme.title: E1 - The Clean Up Crew
programme.desc: Winter in Marakele National Park is one of the scarcest, but also most plentiful, times of the year. See how a giraffe’s demise becomes a source of life for the region’s vultures, whose survival depends on the decaying flesh of animals like these.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E239
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: E4 - Nepals Mountain Climbing Kids
programme.desc: High up in the mountains of Central Nepal, a small elementary school is taking advantage of its geography to introduce mountain climbing classes to its curriculum.

programme.title: E5 - Not So Pretty In Pink
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: E3 - Elizabeth And Ryan
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: E10 - Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup Featuring Anna Gass
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: E3 - Elizabeth And Ryan
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: E10 - Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup Featuring Anna Gass
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: E5 - Not So Pretty In Pink
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: E65 - Chicken Meatballs With Oatmeal
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by bringing us three different pastas in three colours. She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese.

programme.title: E6 - A Diff-Occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: E6 - A Diff-Occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: E5 - Not So Pretty In Pink
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: E6 - A Diff-Occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Trials and Tribulations
programme.desc: Coach Esther brings in a star choreographer to try and get the Icicles in shape. Meanwhile, ice hockey-mad Charlie is joined by his best friend as they compete in a late-night trial.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part II
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for a sleepover in the HQ, but it seems impossible to divide the space, so they each have a separate bedroom. Alim knows of places where people feel more comfortable sleeping together in the same room. Everyone is soon in Japan for a new adventure.

programme.title: The Depixelator!
programme.desc: Albert spent months on his best assignment-until Flippy and Robbie's indoor basketball game wrecks his laptop. Motor fixes it, but the file is gone. If only they could go inside the computer! With Motor's help, they do-until Flippy and Albert get sent in an email!

programme.title: The Filth
programme.desc: Sir Howler is expecting a visit from the king any second! Only problem is, the town where he lives is a total garbage dump! So the Little Urchins get to work to make the place look spic and span, demonstrating the spectrum of medieval cleaning techniques.

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Adventure
programme.desc: While practicing some circus-style tricks, team Doki gets an idea to put on a real circus show for all their friends of the Worldwide Expedition Club. Doki wants it to be amazing, so they set off to a real circus to find out how to put on the Greatest Show on Earth.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Mystery of the Headless Haunter
programme.desc: Addison has to solve the mystery of what's making scary sounds after Donnie convinces the other kids on an Ayrton Rangers camping trip that a mythical spook called the Headless Haunter is wandering through the park.

programme.title: Short Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph is finding it hard to finish his painting in the dark and his lamp is not working properly. Perhaps it has a short circuit that needs fixing?

programme.title: Engaging Engineering
programme.desc: How do simple building elements create architecture? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of construction. Have hands-on fun by building your own tower, and get to know Fazlur Rahman Khan, who came up with the ‘tube' structure in skyscraper design.

programme.title: Embiggenator
programme.desc: Motor creates a machine that can increase the size of objects, and soon everyone wants something made bigger, from paint cans to televisions to little Albert...

programme.title: Toothache
programme.desc: Dentists first appeared in Ancient Egypt. But their techniques were not the same as they are today. Far from it... For some children, going to the dentist was a real ordeal.

programme.title: Water Bat
programme.desc: Red and Grey learn about bat echolocation and wonder what it would be like to see with their ears. Franky struggles to understand the concept of slow motion in nature documentaries. And Fleabag reluctantly agrees to take his annual bath.

programme.title: S'no Trouble
programme.desc: When Fico can't yodel down an avalanche of snow from the clubhouse roof, Doki wonders what does cause avalanches? Luckily, it's time for their ski trip to Innsbruck, Austria. The team must find a way to start a real, controlled avalanche, to make things safe again!

programme.title: Art of the Steal
programme.desc: Anabella is taking a special art class at an art museum. She manages to produce a near perfect copy of The Starry Night, by Vincent Van Gogh. But soon after the end of the class, a masterpiece goes missing. How can the team prove that Anabella is innocent?

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: E9 - This Is Going To Hurt

programme.title: I Heal You, You Heal Me
I Heal You, You Heal Me
I Heal You, You Heal Me
E35 - Tummy Talk
programme.desc: When Sarah forgets her sandwich, her rumbling tummy inadvertently starts a conversation with a Frog.

programme.title: E48 - First Aid
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Instead, they go about the town making good use of Myrtle's newfound abilities.

programme.title: E16 - It's Time To Build A Sandcastle
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran go on a day-trip to the seaside to build a big sandcastle for Panda. But JoJo learns that things need not last forever to be special!

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E12 - Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: E10 - The Cheese Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E5 - Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: E10 - Walkie Talkie
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E40 - Pirate Peril, Jamaica
programme.desc: Xuli dives into action when Glitch's pirate game puts Lars in danger. Yo-ho Go Jetters go!

programme.title: E9 - Horsey Ride
programme.desc: When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E36 - The Water Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.desc: Showcasing various programs and activities of NHK WORLD-JAPAN which provides the latest information on Japan and Asia to the global audience.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: The 'Instruction Manual' Show 'Bathing'
programme.desc: A unique theater show in which the showman chooses one item of the world and presents how to use or operate it with some surprising facts and useful tips that might 'update' your life.

programme.title: E80 - Shrimad Ramayan
programme.desc: An epic tale that explores the eternal battle between good and evil, highlighting the quest for righteousness and spiritual awakening

programme.title: E1231 - Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: E33 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: E4709 - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The lively and diverse residents of Gokuldham Housing Society live together as one big family. They navigate everyday challenges, celebrate festivals and find joy in each other's company.

programme.title: E809 - Pups Save Rocket Ryder
programme.desc: The pups need to rescue Ryder and Alex when they get out of control on a rocket-powered ATV.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E320 - Talent Day
programme.desc: It is Talent Day at Peppa's daycare. Madame Gazelle wants everyone to show the class their special talent.

programme.title: E323 - Goldie The Fish
programme.desc: Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food, so Peppa, George and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.

programme.title: E403 - The Chicken Circus!
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Darington are in the front row for the amazing Chicken Circus! But when Crusher accidentally launches the chickens far, far away, it's up to Blaze and Darington to get their feathered friends back to the big top!

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E107 - The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Sh
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: E905 - The Great Bedtime Race
programme.desc: It's nighttime in Axle City, and Blaze and AJ stumble upon the race of their dreams: the Great Bedtime Race! But Crusher is also in the race and he won't rest until he wins. Will Blaze come out on top, or will Crusher take home the Nightlight Trophy?

programme.title: E1012 - Pups Save A Hum-Nata / Pups Stop The Foggy Skies
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Marshall Kitty gets trapped inside a life-sized pinata. / Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

programme.title: E105 - Fun And Games / King Thistle Is Not Well
programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E307 - The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sp
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: E113 - Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: E404 - Sun, Sea And Snow
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the beach where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!

programme.title: E105 - Fun And Games / King Thistle Is Not Well
programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Sh
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E2 - Secrets Of The State
programme.desc: In 2017, three classified videos of Navy pilots encountering 'tic tac' UFOs were leaked. But these were not the first sightings of the strange objects.

programme.title: E4 - The Bermondsey Horror
programme.desc: A body is found under a kitchen floor, and the homeowners are on the run. After their arrest they have different stories about how the victim died.

programme.title: The Moon And Beyond
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong's first steps on the moon in 1969, and China's landing on the lunar far side. It is a celebrates the legacy of humanity's grand spirit of exploration.

programme.title: E5 - Locomotives / Clotted Cream / Boomerangs
programme.desc: The world's favourite pop-science show returns for another globetrotting, fact-packed season.

programme.desc: Find out how hollow disk pumps, palm sugar, and yachts are made.

programme.desc: From the light sabre to the Death Star, Star Wars is one of the defining science fiction works of the later 20th century.

programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning.

E112 - Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: E305 - Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: E306 - SwellMelonFest
programme.desc: Chapa, Miles, Mika, and Bose are thrilled to have landed dates for the once-every-twenty-years SwellMelonFest until threats come in prompting Ray to make them work security. The threats become a reality when the kids must fight The Cell at the event.

programme.title: E215 - iRocked the Vote
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: E211 - The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: With some loose Mutagen at stake, Mikey questions Rod's siblings, the notorious and eccentric MAUDE and TODD... both of whom are trying to get their hands on some mutant blood as well. Can Mikey find Rod before it's too late?

programme.title: E271 - Something Narwhal This Way Comes / C.H.U.M.S.
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit Bikini Bottom, but they bring a big problem along with them. // After falling down the drain, Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: E201 - The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: E406 - Sea Haw / Li'l Past-cals
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a countrified variety show. // The Kelpbed Kids travel to the future to get their kicking can back.

programme.title: E517 - Much Ado About Noshing / Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: The kids help Dad track down the mystery person who left Lynn's Table a bad review online. // The Action News Team has to cater to Chandler's demands after he buys the club new equipment.

programme.title: E1008 - Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E107 - Not So Fast and Furious
programme.desc: A new super-fast villain is wreaking havoc in Secret Shores, and Billy is the only hope at tracking her down. After Billy's speed accidentally triggers an avalanche, however, he decides to hang up his cape and retire from being a superhero.

programme.title: E505 - The Great Cactus Con
programme.desc: Jasper gets the chance to take his crush to Cactus Con. When a mysterious villain gets involved the entire gang is forced into action!

programme.title: E206 - Bars
programme.desc: It's East Packer High's talent show fundraiser and Sadie starts to feel the pressure of running the event. Lay Lay is confident that her song will be a big hit for the show until, she meets a big-time music producer who challenges her writing style.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E1008 - Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E104 - The Sweet Spot / A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

programme.title: International Cross-Strait Critics
programme.desc: The global situation is changing rapidly, and the interactions between the two sides of the Taiwan Strait and the four regions are frequent, with every action closely related. programme.title: E8 - Melanie's Challenges/The Keeper Of The Keys
programme.desc: In 2006, Melanie Brugger had a terrible riding accident. She suffered a head injury and was in a coma for 27 days. When she awoke, she decided to take up mountaineering. Vincent Hammel hails from Porrentruy and nurtures a passion for his city's history.

programme.title: E54 - Aix-Les-Bains (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on Chanaz, known as the Little Venice of the Alps, and Savoyard costumes.

programme.title: E8 - Melanie's Challenges/The Keeper Of The Keys
programme.desc: In 2006, Melanie Brugger had a terrible riding accident. She suffered a head injury and was in a coma for 27 days. When she awoke, she decided to take up mountaineering. Vincent Hammel hails from Porrentruy and nurtures a passion for his city's history.

programme.title: E18 - Musee Des Douanes/Arnaud Faye/Glenn Martens/Bettenfeld-Rosenblum
programme.desc: In Bordeaux, the Musee des Douanes shines a spotlight on one of France's oldest institutions. Interview with Arnaud Faye, head of the Bristol restaurants. For the Diesel show, Glenn Martens transformed the catwalk into a graffiti area. Sheathing and gilding: the Bettenfeld-Rosenblum workshop has been working with leather since 1895.

programme.desc: Carinne visits a unique inn in Ally, run for 50 years by ten local farming families.

programme.title: E1 - Life In The Land Of My Ancestors
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: E105
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E1 - Life In The Land Of My Ancestors
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia’s Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our bikers try llama brains and Rooftop nearly gets run over as a dancing zebra in the streets. The two top their Bolivian trip off with a trip to the mines on the hunt for silver. With some of the most dangerous activities yet, will Rooftop and Catfish be able to leave Bolivia with just a few bumps and bruises from along the way?

programme.title: E4 - Thailand
programme.desc: In the most action packed trip yet, Rooftop and Catfish’s trip to Thailand has them face to face with the country’s nature. They wrestle a crocodile, charm a cobra, and get a massage from an elephant that’s somehow more relaxing than the traditional Thai massages they tried out. The two even attempt to catch (cooked) flying chickens on their heads. Things relaxed in Thailand for a moment when the BMX bikers got to balance out this animal packed experience with the spiritual side of the country, each getting Sak Yant, a traditional Thai tattoo. However, the relaxation was short-lived as Catfish and Rooftops’s final battle in Thailand requires them to make it out of a May Thai boxing match alive.

programme.title: E6 - A Pirate Ship´s Last Jaunt
programme.desc: A pirate ship on a voyage. The Kogas - a retired pirate ship, is to start a new life as a noble restaurant in Berlin. But the journey to get there will be difficult, for the Kogas is docked in Lithuania. A risky and extremely difficult heavy transport over a distance of one thousand kilometres lies ahead. Because the Kogas weighs almost fifty tonnes, a special ship will take it across the Baltic Sea to Poland, and from there across the Oder and the Havel Canal to Berlin. The last journey of the Kogas - a huge logistical task where not everything will always go according to plan.

programme.title: Malaysia Regional Cup '26 E2 -Marvels v Wildcats
Malaysia Regional Cup '26 E2 -Marvels v Wildcats
Malaysia Regional Cup '26 E2 -Marvels v Wildcats
Malaysia Regional Cup '26 E2 -Marvels v Wildcats
E30
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. programme.title: E19
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: E12 - All's Hair
programme.desc: When a celebrity wigmaker is murdered, Elsbeth must comb through a tangled mess of suspects – and some drag brunch mayhem – to clip a killer.

programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: A musician plagued by insomnia is pulled into an odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

programme.title: E1 - Vanished
programme.desc: SWAT tackles a mission with personal ties for Hondo when they race to find a group of missing students and their bus driver, Hondo's former high school football coach.

programme.title: The Eight Hundred
programme.desc: The film is based on true stories taking place during Sino-Japanese war in Shanghai, China, in 1937, the battle and protection of the Si Hang Warehouse. There are around 400 soldiers (so called Eight Hundred Heroes in history), holding out against numerous waves of Japanese forces for 4 days and 4 nights...

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: 'The Moment' talks about four relationships - A couple breaking up yet holding tight; a father and a daughter meeting up after a long separation; a girl escaping from growing up; and two buddies' reunion after years of misunderstanding. Different people carry different stories. The stories are connected by a vintage photography studio holder. Their experiences bring out a variety of sensations to the city we are living in; these feelings belong to them, and also us.

programme.title: Heyy Baby
programme.desc: Three men living in Australia are surprised to find a baby on their doorstep. They do not know who the father is and start a frantic search for the woman who could possibly be the mother.

programme.title: Baahubali
programme.desc: In the kingdom of Mahishmati, Shivudu falls in love with a fair maiden. While trying to woo her, he learns about the conflict-ridden past of his family and his true legacy.

programme.title: Laapataa Ladies
programme.desc: Two newlyweds find themselves inadvertently separated from their husbands moments after their respective weddings.

programme.title: Beyond's Diary
programme.desc: This is the story of four aspiring young men striving to fight for their own goals. Kui and his family are intent upon emigrating to another country and they put all their energy in making as much money as possible in order to leave Hong Kong sooner. However just as their goal is about in sight, over-exertion causes Kui to fall ill...Keung is a smart and aggressive young man whose ambition is to make it in the world. But misfortune descends upon him when discovering that he and his family are duped by his boss...It has been a childhood dream of Chung to join the police force but his fragile frame of a body is far from satisfactory, so he turns to conducting traffic and handing out tickets to unfortunate drivers amid the bustles of the streets. However, his virtue is not appreciated...Wing is a diligent and self-absorbed student. His goal is to be one of the chosen few at his college's Music Department but he is dissuaded by his girlfriend's father. In the end he gives in and

programme.title: Love Unto Wastes
programme.desc: Billie Yuen and her two friends Liao Yu Ping and Zhao Shu Ling who came from Taiwan, share the same ideal to become famous. The three women met Tony Cheung who is the son of a rice wholesaler at a bar. Tony was madly clung to the indifferent dressing Billie and then they cohabit. The four friends spent a good night at Liao's home, celebrating her birthday. One night, when Liao came home late, Zhao was found being murdered. Liao was filled with great sorrow. The three friends received Sergeant Lan's inquiry individually. Liao felt depressed since her best friend conceals everything. Tony accompanied Liao back home, the sight stroke a chord in her heart and Tony tried hard to comfort her, then they had sex. Liao was pregnant, it shocked Billie, whereas Tony felt difficult to choose. Finally both Liao and Billie left Tony and the three noticed the one they love the most is-themselves.

programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E3 - 拆解職場核心競爭力
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。
